title: JRN Multiplicative Compounding on rel-f1 + Entropy vs GBM Probe Architecture Comparison
summary: Demo notebook for the JRN Multiplicative Compounding experiment on the rel-f1 (Formula 1) relational dataset. Part A tests whether chain JRN equals the product of individual JRNs across 10 multi-hop FK join chains. Part B compares entropy-based JRN proxy vs GBM probe rankings and evaluates 4 architecture configurations (probe-guided, entropy-guided, uniform-mean, uniform-rich) across 3 driver prediction tasks. Uses a curated 494-example subset with 9 tables, 13 FK joins, and task samples for driver-dnf, driver-top3, and driver-position tasks. LightGBM probes measure predictive signal gain from each join.
